queryList.1: hp_master: select * from shop where shop_id = 221864167
queryList.2: hp_master: select mc.member_city_id, mc.city_id, mc.packet_num, mc.member_price, mc.save_price, mc.create_time, mc.update_time, mc.is_del, mc.derate_price, mc.title, mc.is_open_delivery_discount, mc.member_privilege_desc, mc.module_activity_id, mc.member_activity_name, mc.member_card_type, mc.member_discount_price, mc.bulletin, mc.popups_sts, mc.popups_main_title, mc.popups_sub_title, mc.member_benefit, mc.member_version, mc.delivery_use_num, mc.online_status, mc.delivery_range_limit,mc.checkout_sts,mc.auto_renew,mc.first_month_price,mc.renew_price,mc.version,mc.delivery_use_num_limit, mc.delivery_use_type,mc.delivery_use_version,mc.first_month_price_period,mc.first_pay_price,mc.first_renew_pay_price,mc.tag_id,mc.is_open_shop_packet, mc.order_price_threshold,mc.renew_info_type,mc.time_zone ,a.address_config_id, mcr.city_name from member_city mc, member_city_relation mcr,address_config a where mc.`member_city_id` = mcr.`member_city_id` AND mcr.city_name = a.`city_name` AND mc.is_del = 0 AND a.is_del = 0 AND mcr.`city_name` = '九江市' AND mc.online_status = 1 ORDER BY mc.`create_time` DESC
queryList.3: hp_master: select a.shop_id as shopId, a.shop_name as shopName, a.shop_status as shopStatus, b.add_country as addCountry, b.add_location as addLocation, b.add_longitude as addLongitude, b.add_latitude as addLatitude, a.service_phone as servicePhone, b.country_code as countryCode, a.shop_logo as shopLogo, b.add_city as addCity, a.is_del as isDel, a.off_peak_time as offPeakTime, a.peak_time as peakTime, a.audit_status as auditStatus, a.address_id as addressId from shop as a,address as b where a.address_id = b.add_id and a.shop_id = 221864167
queryList.4: hp_master: select mc.member_city_id, mc.city_id, mc.packet_num, mc.member_price, mc.save_price, mc.create_time, mc.update_time, mc.is_del, mc.derate_price, mc.title, mc.is_open_delivery_discount, mc.member_privilege_desc, mc.module_activity_id, mc.member_activity_name, mc.member_card_type, mc.member_discount_price, mc.bulletin, mc.popups_sts, mc.popups_main_title, mc.popups_sub_title, mc.member_benefit, mc.member_version, mc.delivery_use_num, mc.online_status, mc.delivery_range_limit,mc.checkout_sts,mc.auto_renew,mc.first_month_price,mc.renew_price,mc.version,mc.delivery_use_num_limit, mc.delivery_use_type,mc.delivery_use_version,mc.first_month_price_period,mc.first_pay_price,mc.first_renew_pay_price,mc.tag_id,mc.is_open_shop_packet, mc.order_price_threshold,mc.renew_info_type,mc.time_zone ,a.address_config_id, mcr.city_name from member_city mc, member_city_relation mcr,address_config a where mc.`member_city_id` = mcr.`member_city_id` AND mcr.city_name = a.`city_name` AND mc.is_del = 0 AND a.is_del = 0 AND mcr.`city_name` = '九江市' AND mc.online_status = 1 ORDER BY mc.`create_time` DESC
queryList.5: hp_master: SELECT DISTINCT coupon_template_sn FROM hp_member_coupon_template_relation hmctr JOIN hp_member_shop_red_packet_configuration hmsrpc on hmctr.hp_member_shop_red_packet_configuration_id = hmsrpc.id WHERE hmctr.is_del = 0 AND hmctr.member_city_id = 1111378 AND hmsrpc.member_city_id = 1111378 AND hmsrpc.group_status = 0 AND hmsrpc.start_date <= '2025-05-29' AND hmsrpc.end_date >= '2025-05-29' AND hmsrpc.is_del = 0
queryList.6: hp_master: SELECT id,city,show_module,show_filter,update_user_id,update_user_name,update_time,create_time,add_price_show_module,add_price_full_desc,add_price_discount_desc,red_packet_ids,home_view,home_view_times FROM activity_popup_red_packet_panda_league_config WHERE (city = '九江市') limit 1
